title: AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF LOOK IN THE CITY OF LIPA

chunks.text:
H. No. 5372 / 53 OG No. 16, 5145 (August 31, 1957)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1714, June 21, 1957 ]

AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF LOOK IN THE CITY OF LIPA

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sitios of Waniwani, Sayatin and Look, barrio of Balete, City of Lipa, are separated from said barrio and constituted into a distinct and independent Barrio of said city, to be known as the barrio of Look.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 21, 1957.
